who: CFOs of small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For CFOs of small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate cash flow forecasts cause financial mismanagement. We generate cash flow forecasts instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate cash flow forecasts lead to financial mismanagement.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for CFOs seeking help
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to CFOs with a demo video
Community forums where CFOs share tools
try_it: Let users try cash flow forecast generation and email notifications
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
